message:
feat: add fcp-policy and fcp-evidence crates for FCP3 semantic carve-outs

Create two new crates for FCP3 Phase 2 semantic ownership:

fcp-policy (P2.2): canonical owner of zone, capability, provenance, and
approval semantics. Re-exports ~60 types from fcp-core organized into
8 domain groups: zone model, zone keys, capability tokens, identity/trust,
provenance/taint, approval workflow, policy engine, policy diffs.
7 tests verify all domains compile.

fcp-evidence (P2.3): canonical owner of receipts, audit chain, checkpoints,
and revocation. Re-exports ~30 types from fcp-core organized into 6 domain
groups: audit chain, revocation, operation receipts, checkpoints, supply
chain attestation. 5 tests verify all domains compile.

Both crates follow the same Phase 1 strategy as fcp-kernel: re-export from
fcp-core now, move definitions later. Consumers should target fcp_policy::
and fcp_evidence:: imports for new code.

Part of beads whkbp (P2.1), q1d0x (P2.2), 2m2hl (P2.3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-evidence"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+description = "FCP evidence system — canonical owner of receipts, audit chain, checkpoints, and revocation"
+license = "Apache-2.0"
+publish = false
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-policy"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+description = "FCP policy engine — canonical owner of zone, capability, provenance, and approval semantics"
+license = "Apache-2.0"
+publish = false
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
